name: The Riddell National Bank
description_short: Riddell National Bank is a community bank serving Clay County since 1885, offering personal and business lending, deposit accounts, and digital banking services.
description_long:
Riddell National Bank has been operating since 1885, positioning itself as a traditional community bank with modern digital capabilities. The bank's tagline "Today's Banking, Yesterday's Values" reflects its approach to combining contemporary banking technology with established community relationships. Based on their website presence at riddellonline.com, they maintain a focus on personalized service to Clay County residents and businesses.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of lending products including personal loans, auto loans, mortgage loans, home equity loans, commercial real estate loans, equipment financing, agricultural loans, and SBA loans. On the deposit side, they provide personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, individual retirement accounts, and corresponding business account options. Their banking services include online banking platforms, mobile banking with card management features, instant issue debit cards, and account services for both personal and business customers.

Riddell distinguishes itself through community-focused service ("Proudly supporting Clay County") and convenience features like instant issue debit cards available for same-day pickup and mobile banking that allows customers to control cards remotely. Their "Where You Go...We Follow" messaging emphasizes digital accessibility. The bank also provides travel notification services and financial calculators to support customer financial planning.

As a regional community bank rather than a national institution, Riddell's reach is limited to Clay County and surrounding areas. Their website provides service overview information but limited transparency on specific rates, fees, or competitive terms compared to larger national banks. The bank appears well-established and legitimate, though detailed product specifications and pricing would require direct contact.
services: Mortgage loans and mortgage center services
Credit cards for personal and business use
pros: Established institution with 139+ years of banking history since 1885
Instant issue debit cards available for same-day pickup at branch locations
Mobile banking app with card control features allowing cardholders to turn cards on/off remotely
Comprehensive lending options including personal, auto, mortgage, commercial, agricultural, and SBA loans
Both personal and business account offerings with checking, savings, and CD options
Travel notification service to prevent card blocks during international travel
Online banking and mobile banking accessibility for account management
Free financial calculators available to help with financial planning
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Clay County, not available nationally
Website lacks specific interest rates, APR terms, or fee schedules for products
No information about FDIC insurance limits or deposit protections explicitly stated on reviewed pages
Limited transparency on loan approval criteria, qualification requirements, or processing timelines
Instant issue debit card service carries an unspecified "small fee" not detailed on website
best_for: Clay County residents seeking relationship-based banking with local decision-making
Small business owners and agricultural operations needing specialized lending products
Customers prioritizing digital convenience with mobile card management features
Individuals seeking traditional bank stability combined with modern online banking access
diagnosis: Riddell National Bank is best for Clay County residents and business owners seeking community-focused banking with both traditional and digital services. Primary caveat: this is a regional bank with no national presence, so it only serves customers in and around Clay County; those outside this area will need to bank elsewhere.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
